labeling.method: frame-verified caption BAND, with NO token-count floor — added specifically to remove the >=2-token exclusion that made single-word captions impossible in this dataset
labeling.IMPORTANT: Labeled by position, so this cell must NOT be used to evaluate position-based rules (circular). It IS valid for evaluating persistence and the token floor, which are independent of position.
honesty: Caption band frame-verified at t=1: '$100' in green at y~0.6, a SINGLE-TOKEN caption.
The banknote's serial number (PB26551527E) appears across bands and is excluded by pattern, not by position.
Scene text (shop prices in EUR, GUITAR, JANSPORT) sits above the caption band.
